history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right. The cell directly ahead (row 02, column C) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to go down to navigate around the lava. Turning right will make me face down, allowing me to move downward along column B, which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 03, column B) is floor ('.'), so I can move forward safely. This will bring me closer to the bottom area where I can eventually go around the lava to reach the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 04, column B) is floor ('.'), so I can move forward safely. I will continue moving down along column B until I reach row 06, where I can turn right and navigate around the lava to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 05, column B) is a floor tile ('.'), so it's safe to move forward. Continuing down along column B will lead to row 06, where I can turn right and navigate east toward the goal at (08, H).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column B) is floor (`.`), so it's safe to move forward. Continuing down will bring me to row 06, where I can then turn right to head east toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B, facing down. The goal is at (08, H). The direct path down is blocked by lava to the east later. Instead, I should turn right to face east, then move east along row 06 to column F, then go south to row 07, then east to column H, then south to the goal. So the next action is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, B) facing left. I need to go east to reach the goal at (8, H). The path is: go east along row 6 to column F, then south, then east, then south. To face east, I need to turn twice. I'll turn left first to face down (south), then next turn left to face east. So the next action is TURN_LEFT.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, B) facing down. To go east towards the goal, I need to face right. From facing down, turning left (counter-clockwise) will make me face right. So the next action is TURN_LEFT.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, B) facing right. The next cell to the east (6, C) is a floor cell. I will move forward to advance towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, C) facing right. The next cell east (6, D) is a floor cell. I will move forward to continue progressing eastward along the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, D) facing right. The next cell east (6, E) is a floor cell. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, E) facing right. The next cell east (6, F) is a floor cell. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, F) facing east. The cell ahead (6, G) is lava. I need to go south to reach (7, F), then later move east and south to the goal at (8, H). Turning right will make me face south, allowing me to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, F) facing down. The cell directly ahead (7, F) is a floor cell. Moving forward will get me closer to the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, F) facing down. The goal is at (8, H). To reach it, I need to go east to (7, G) and then (7, H), then south to (8, H). Currently facing down, so I need to turn left to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, F) facing east. The cell ahead (7, G) is a floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, G) facing east. The cell ahead (7, H) is a floor cell. Moving forward will bring me to (7, H), from where I can then turn right to face south and move to the goal at (8, H).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, H) facing east. The cell ahead (7, I) is a wall. The goal is directly south at (8, H). To face south, I need to turn right from east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, H) facing down. The goal is directly below at (8, H). The cell ahead is the goal, which is safe to occupy.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
